text: The clean lines, glass, and subdued lighting of this modern space make me feel both curious and a touch alienated. There is promise in the display ahead—"R+D," a place of research and development. I sense innovation, a showcase of knowledge and possibility. Yet, something about the emptiness and the silent hum of technology evokes a reflective solitude. Here, I am surrounded by the tension between human ingenuity and the sterile order of machines. I feel a mixture of awe and cautious optimism.
